ValidationRule.description: Fires when a candidate is updated to Active. Ensures there is a birthdate and timezone
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( AND(ISNEW(), ISPICKVAL(TR1__Candidate_Status__c, "Active")), AND(NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(TR1__Candidate_Status__c), ISPICKVAL(TR1__Candidate_Status__c, "Active")) ), OR( ISBLANK(Birthdate), ISBLANK(TEXT(Candidate_Timezone__c)) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The candidate must have a Birthdate and Candidate Time Zone before activation. Please enter both fields before updating the status to Active.
